guarantee.title: 60-Day Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.p1: Our supplements are backed by a 60-day money-back guarantee from the date of purchase.
guarantee.p2: If after at least 30 days of use you are not completely satisfied, simply contact us for a full refund.

faq.q: How and why does VapoFil work?
faq.a: VapoFil combines potent natural extracts through a multifaceted scientific approach to optimize male health. It increases testosterone, improves circulation, supports prostate health, and enhances energy and libido.
Yes. VapoFil is produced in FDA-registered, GMP-certified facilities in the United States with all-natural, stimulant-free, gluten-free ingredients.

faq.q: How and when should I take VapoFil?
faq.a: We recommend taking 2 capsules daily, preferably in the morning with a glass of water.

faq.q: How many bottles should I order?
faq.a: Most customers choose the 6-bottle kit for the biggest discount and free shipping. The longer you use it, the more consistent and lasting the results.

faq.q: Can you remind me about the guarantee?
faq.a: Absolutely! VapoFil is backed by an unconditional 60-day guarantee. You have two full months to test the product at your own pace.

faq.q: How long will VapoFil be available?
faq.a: Stock is limited and can run out quickly. We recommend securing your kit today while supplies last.
